_publications._publicationTitle: Cognitive dysfunction in NF1 knock-out mice may result from altered vesicular trafficking of APP/DRD3 complex.

_contextSnippet: Affymetrix microarray fold change values correlate well with the trend of transcript levels calculated through RT-PCR reactions. Though the exact fold change values are not identical, the two assays show consistent trends
details: Fold change values correlate well with RT-PCR validation trends, showing consistent regulation patterns though exact values differ
